expected_behavior: Canopy storage fills to capacity, throughfall starts only after capacity is exceeded, evaporation depletes canopy storage, and LAI=0 bypasses interception.
acceptance_threshold: <1e-6 m3 for storage residual and <1e-9 m equivalent for bypass checks
notes: MATLAB HydroPol2D interceptionModel output passes Phase 1 v-tilted-zone reference diagnostics.

expected_behavior: Cold precipitation accumulates as snow, transitional precipitation follows the active 4 to 7 C partition rule, warm precipitation remains rain, positive energy/temperature melts snow, sublimation removes storage without runoff, and total storage balance closes.
acceptance_threshold: <1e-6 m3 residual and series errors below 1e-8 in native units
notes: MATLAB HydroPol2D Snow_Model_Function output passes Phase 1 v-tilted-zone reference diagnostics.

expected_behavior: No infiltration occurs and rainfall excess equals surface water plus outlet discharge after storage accounting.
acceptance_threshold: <0.1% full-domain water-balance error and infiltrated volume numerically zero
notes: Reuse existing case after current-code rerun.

expected_behavior: All available rainfall infiltrates until supply is exhausted and surface runoff remains negligible.
acceptance_threshold: <0.1% water-balance error and runoff near numerical tolerance
notes: Reuse existing supply-limited case.

expected_behavior: Infiltration is capped by soil hydraulic capacity and excess rainfall becomes surface runoff.
acceptance_threshold: <0.1% water-balance error and capacity error documented
notes: Reuse existing capacity-limited case.

expected_behavior: Soil fills to available storage, saturation excess is returned to the surface, and final soil storage is bounded by capacity.
acceptance_threshold: <0.1% water-balance error and storage bounded by capacity
notes: Reuse existing shallow-soil saturation case.

expected_behavior: Vadose storage, groundwater storage, surface return flow, and runoff close as a coupled mass balance without NaN diagnostics.
acceptance_threshold: <0.1% domain error and no unexplained NaN in summary outputs
notes: Rebuild diagnostics and rerun before reporting as validated.

expected_behavior: Groundwater mound/recharge propagates downslope and coupled vadose/GW/surface balance closes.
acceptance_threshold: <0.1% domain error, physically monotonic profiles where expected, and no unexplained NaN
notes: Diagnostic only until NaN summaries and groundwater diagnostics are corrected.

expected_behavior: Reference ET is reproduced for prescribed meteorology, soil extraction stops at residual/available limits, and open-water ET is bounded by available depth.
acceptance_threshold: <1e-6 m3 storage residual and reference ET within documented formula tolerance
notes: New independent reference-value test.

expected_behavior: Ritter dam-break analytical depth and velocity profiles are reproduced on a frictionless/idealized domain.
primary_metrics: RMSE; MAE; max_error; relative_L2; peak_timing_error; peak_magnitude_error; NSE; mass_balance_error_pct
acceptance_threshold: <0.1% water-balance error; analytical profile errors reported and pass/fail threshold documented
notes: Existing benchmark with current tables, but report uses fresh current-code rerun.

expected_behavior: Non-breaking wave benchmark preserves expected analytical wave propagation, profile shape, and stored volume over the active domain.
primary_metrics: RMSE; MAE; max_error; relative_L2; front_error_m; NSE; storage_residual_pct
acceptance_threshold: profile RMSE <0.05 m, relative L2 <0.05, storage residual <5%, front error <=8 grid cells
notes: Current-code analytical benchmark alongside Ritter.

expected_behavior: Tilted-plane hydrograph follows analytical kinematic-wave behavior after implementation and diagnostic review.
acceptance_threshold: Diagnostic only until corrected and rerun; eventual target <0.1% mass-balance error
notes: Existing tilted-plane outputs remain diagnostic only.

expected_behavior: Corrected kinematic and diffusive alternatives reproduce controlled synthetic plane behavior where their reduced-equation assumptions apply and conserve mass on V-tilted and stage-boundary cases.
acceptance_threshold: <0.1% mass-balance error and documented benchmark metrics; Ritter remains diagnostic for reduced routing equations
notes: Implementation audit completed for kinematic and diffusive D4 solvers; CA/D8 remains interpreted primarily as routing bookkeeping evidence.

expected_behavior: Lookup-table subgrid storage, shared-face geometry/conveyance, areal source/sink conversion, and controlled local-inertial/full-momentum coupling match rectangular-channel references and exact volume ledgers.
primary_metrics: volume_rmse_m3; face_geometry_error_pct; conveyance_error_pct; source_sink_volume_residual_m3; local_inertial_q_error_m2_s; full_momentum_flat_depth_rmse_m; low_friction_volume_residual_m3
acceptance_threshold: storage residual <1e-9 m3, conveyance error <0.1%, coupled mass error <0.1%, flat full-momentum NSE >0.999
notes: Passed current-code lookup-table subgrid validation with face width/perimeter/Rh/conveyance checks and low-friction local-inertial stability diagnostic; legacy River_Width/River_Depth overbank pathway remains diagnostic/deprecated.

expected_behavior: A 30 m lookup-subgrid full-momentum compound-channel run is compared against a 10 m explicit full-momentum numerical-reference run.
acceptance_threshold: diagnostic failed: target NSE >0.90, RMSE <2 m3/s, volume/storage errors <10%
notes: Current code gets peak and cumulative outlet volume roughly right but drains storage too aggressively; full-momentum subgrid needs face-area/effective-depth conveyance and outlet coupling.

expected_behavior: A 30 m lookup-subgrid local-inertial steady-flow ladder with SFINCS-style face depth/effective roughness closure is compared against a 10 m ordinary local-inertial numerical-reference compound-channel response at internal gauges.
acceptance_threshold: diagnostic failed: inbank depth RMSE <0.05 m and storage error <5%; near-bankfull/overbank depth RMSE <0.10 m and storage error <10%; mass residual <0.1%
notes: SFINCS-style closure passes unit checks but not the compound ladder; Q=5 m3/s is a near-pass, Q=10 m3/s fails stage/storage targets, and higher rungs are diagnostic because the 10 m local-inertial reference is not valid.

expected_behavior: Reservoir storage depletes according to Q=k(h-h0)^b and matches the exact storage ODE within numerical integration tolerance.
acceptance_threshold: storage RMSE <2 m3, outflow RMSE <0.01 m3/s, recovered k error <0.1%, mass residual <1e-8%
notes: Passed current-code analytical rating-curve validation.

expected_behavior: Known inflow hydrograph enters a rectangular domain with correct imposed volume, routing delay, and downstream conservation; breach-style hydrographs belong here.
acceptance_threshold: imposed-volume error <0.01%, water-balance error <0.1%, downstream response >1e-4 m3/s
notes: No separate dam-break/breach-hydrograph validation section; current full-momentum boundary test passed.

expected_behavior: Prescribed boundary stage is enforced and produces expected upstream/downstream stage propagation and volume response.
acceptance_threshold: Boundary stage within numerical tolerance and <0.1% domain water-balance error
notes: New prescribed-stage boundary validation.

expected_behavior: Tiny raster rainfall fields produce exact known cellwise rainfall totals and correct temporal accumulation.
acceptance_threshold: <1e-9 m cellwise rainfall equivalent, <0.1% step-volume error, and <0.1% total-volume error
notes: Stanford remains invariant-rainfall applied example; this is the parser/unit-conversion validation case.

expected_behavior: SWMM-style dry-weather TSS buildup and mass-based washoff under fixed runoff match analytical pollutant mass balance and never produce negative mass.
acceptance_threshold: mass RMSE <1e-6 kg, exported load error <0.01%, mass residual <1e-6 kg or <0.01%, no negative mass
notes: Passed current-code analytical buildup/washoff validation; single-cell RMSE 4.998e-7 kg and two-cell RMSE 6.272e-8 kg.

expected_behavior: Simple drag-friction instability and detailed slide/topple/drowning classes match independent force-balance references across deterministic depth/velocity grids and exact boundary cases.
acceptance_threshold: RMSE = 0 for deterministic checks, 100% classification agreement, zero boundary errors, zero unexplained NaN
notes: Passed current-code deterministic human-risk validation; all stable/sliding/toppling/drowning classes exercised.

expected_behavior: Stanford is an applied example using spatially invariant rainfall, not a spatial rainfall validation benchmark.
